form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished 5th over 400m at Warragul beaten 16 lengths (23.22) behind Carry On Maci in a Free For All on March 31. Key chance on best form.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (25.18) in a Grade 4, finishing a 9 length eighth. Has performed well off the draw with a win and five places from nine starts. Looks well placed and should feature.
